scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @chanchan2/tokens && npm run build --workspace @chanchan2/ui && npm run build --workspace @chanchan2/docs
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @chanchan2/tokens && npm run typecheck --workspace @chanchan2/ui && npm run typecheck --workspace @chanchan2/docs
scripts.clean: npm run clean --workspace @chanchan2/tokens && npm run clean --workspace @chanchan2/ui && npm run clean --workspace @chanchan2/docs
